<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=UTF-8"><style rel="stylesheet" type="text/css">@charset "utf-8";

*, ::before, ::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; }

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; font-size: 16px; }

body { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: rgb(26, 8, 0); background: rgb(255, 255, 255); overflow-x: hidden; cursor: auto; }

img { max-width: 100%; display: block; }

a { text-decoration: none; color: inherit; }

ul { list-style: none; }

button { border: none; background: none; cursor: pointer; font: inherit; }

:root { --brown: #60270F; --brown2: #7A3515; --brown3: #3A0D00; --gold: #C49A0A; --gold2: #9E7C08; --gold3: #E8C44A; --cream: #FBF7F4; --cream2: #F0E8E0; --warm: #2A1200; --muted: #6b5040; --border: #e8ddd6; --max: 1280px; --ease: cubic-bezier(.4, 0, .2, 1); }

#progress { position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px; height: 3px; width: 0px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold), var(--gold3)); z-index: 9999; transition: width 0.08s linear; }

.wrap { width: 100%; max-width: var(--max); margin: 0px auto; padding: 0px 40px; }

.flex-between { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }

.btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 30px; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.92rem; letter-spacing: 0.02em; transition: all .25s var(--ease); cursor: pointer; border: 2px solid transparent; white-space: nowrap; }

.btn-lg { padding: 17px 38px; font-size: 1rem; }

.btn-brown, .btn-primary { background: var(--brown); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); }

.btn-brown:hover, .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--brown3); transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: rgba(96, 39, 15, 0.35) 0px 12px 32px; }

.btn-gold { background: var(--gold); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); }

.btn-gold:hover { background: var(--gold2); transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: rgba(196, 154, 10, 0.4) 0px 12px 32px; }

.btn-outline-w { background: transparent; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); }

.btn-outline-w:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); transform: translateY(-2px); }

.btn-outline-b { background: transparent; color: var(--brown); border-color: var(--brown); }

.btn-outline-b:hover { background: var(--brown); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); transform: translateY(-2px); }

.lbl { font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); display: block; margin-bottom: 14px; }

.lbl-w { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55); }

.h2 { font-family: Merriweather, serif; font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.5vw, 2.8rem); font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.18; color: var(--brown); }

.h2-w { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); }

.p-lead { font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.82; max-width: 540px; }

.p-lead-w { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65); }

.sec { padding: 100px 0px; }

.announce { background: var(--brown3); text-align: center; padding: 11px 0px; font-size: 0.78rem; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); }

.announce strong { color: var(--gold3); }

.announce a { color: var(--gold3); text-decoration: underline; font-weight: 700; }

.a-pulse { display: inline-block; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold3); margin-right: 8px; animation: 2s ease-in-out 0s infinite normal none running pulse; }

@keyframes pulse { 
  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
  50% { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(1.5); }
}

.nav { position: sticky; top: 0px; z-index: 1000; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.97); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); transition: box-shadow 0.3s; }

.nav.scrolled { box-shadow: rgba(58, 13, 0, 0.1) 0px 4px 30px; }

.nav-inner { height: 84px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0px; }

.nav-logo { margin-right: 40px; flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }

.nav-logo img { height: 72px; width: auto; }

.nav-logo-fb { display: none; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }

.nav-logo-fb.show { display: flex; }

.nav-mark { width: 36px; height: 36px; background: var(--brown); border-radius: 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: Merriweather, serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--gold3); }

.nav-brand strong { display: block; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--brown); }

.nav-brand em { font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--muted); font-style: normal; }

.nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0px; margin-left: auto; }

.nav-item { position: relative; }

.nav-item > a, .nav-item > button { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 3px; padding: 6px 9px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.775rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--muted); transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s; background: none; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; }

.nav-item > a:hover, .nav-item > button:hover, .nav-item > a.active, .nav-item.open > a, .nav-item.open > button { color: var(--brown); background: rgba(96, 39, 15, 0.13); }

.nav-chevron { width: 10px; height: 10px; display: inline-block; transition: transform 0.2s; }

.nav-item.open .nav-chevron { transform: rotate(180deg); }

.nav-drop { position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 8px); left: 0px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid var(--border); box-shadow: rgba(58, 13, 0, 0.12) 0px 20px 60px; padding: 8px; min-width: 220px; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-6px); pointer-events: none; transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s; z-index: 900; }

.nav-item.open .nav-drop { opacity: 1; transform: none; pointer-events: auto; }

.nav-drop a { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 9px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--warm); transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; }

.nav-drop a:hover { background: var(--cream); color: var(--brown); }

.nav-drop-icon { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 6px; background: var(--cream2); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; }

.nav-drop-icon svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; }

.nav-drop-text strong { display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--warm); }

.nav-drop-text span { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--muted); display: block; }

.nav-drop-divider { height: 1px; background: var(--border); margin: 6px 0px; }

.nav-mega { position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 8px); left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-6px); background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid var(--border); box-shadow: rgba(58, 13, 0, 0.14) 0px 24px 80px; padding: 24px; width: 720px; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s; z-index: 900; }

.nav-item.open .nav-mega { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0px); pointer-events: auto; }

.nav-mega-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 0px; }

.nav-mega-col { padding: 0px 20px; }

.nav-mega-col:first-child { padding-left: 0px; border-right: 1px solid var(--border); }

.nav-mega-col:last-child { padding-right: 0px; }

.nav-mega-col:nth-child(2) { border-right: 1px solid var(--border); }

.nav-mega-label { font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold2); margin-bottom: 8px; padding-bottom: 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }

.nav-mega-featured { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--brown3), var(--brown)); border-radius: 10px; padding: 18px; margin-bottom: 10px; }

.nav-mega-featured .nav-mega-label { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); }

.nav-mega-featured a { display: block; padding: 0px; border-radius: 0px; }

.nav-mega-featured a:hover { background: none; }

.nav-mega-featured h4 { font-family: Merriweather, serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 900; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); margin-bottom: 5px; }

.nav-mega-featured p { font-size: 0.74rem; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 10px; }

.nav-mega-featured .nm-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 7px 14px; background: var(--gold); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 700; transition: background 0.2s; }

.nav-mega-featured .nm-cta:hover { background: var(--gold2); }

.nav-mega a { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 7px 8px; border-radius: 5px; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--warm); transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; }

.nav-mega a:hover { background: var(--cream); color: var(--brown); }

.nav-mega-dot { width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold); flex-shrink: 0; opacity: 0.6; }

.nav-cta-btn { font-size: 0.78rem; padding: 9px 18px; margin-left: 10px; flex-shrink: 0; }

.burger { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; padding: 8px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; margin-left: 8px; }

.burger span { display: block; width: 22px; height: 2px; background: var(--brown); border-radius: 2px; transition: 0.3s; }

.burger.open span:nth-child(1) { transform: translateY(7px) rotate(45deg); }

.burger.open span:nth-child(2) { opacity: 0; }

.burger.open span:nth-child(3) { transform: translateY(-7px) rotate(-45deg); }

.mob-overlay { display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55); z-index: 1500; }

.mob-overlay.open { display: block; }

.mob-menu { position: fixed; top: 0px; left: -100%; bottom: 0px; width: 300px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); z-index: 1600; overflow: hidden auto; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18) 6px 0px 40px; transition: left .35s var(--ease); }

.mob-menu.open { left: 0px; }

.mob-header { padding: 16px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }

.mob-close { width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--cream); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--brown); cursor: pointer; font-weight: 700; border: none; }

<script src="https://unpkg.com/aos@2.3.1/dist/aos.js"></script>
<script>
/* ─── AOS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
AOS.init({ once: true, offset: 70, duration: 750, easing: 'ease-out-cubic' });


/* ─── Scroll Progress ──────────────────────────────────────── */
const pBar = document.getElementById('progress');
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  const h = document.documentElement;
  pBar.style.width = (h.scrollTop / (h.scrollHeight - h.clientHeight) * 100) + '%';
}, {passive:true});

/* ─── Nav shadow on scroll ─────────────────────────────────── */
const nav = document.getElementById('nav');
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  nav.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 20);
}, {passive:true});

/* ─── Desktop Dropdown / Mega-Menu ─────────────────────────── */
document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(item => {
  const trigger = item.querySelector('.nav-drop-trigger');
  if (!trigger) return;
  let timer;
  const open = () => { clearTimeout(timer); item.classList.add('open'); trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true'); };
  const close = () => { timer = setTimeout(() => { item.classList.remove('open'); trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded','false'); }, 200); };
  item.addEventListener('mouseenter', open);
  item.addEventListener('mouseleave', close);
  trigger.addEventListener('click', () => { if (!item.classList.contains('open')) open(); });
});
// Single listener — closes any open dropdown when clicking outside it
document.addEventListener('click', e => {
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item.open').forEach(item => {
    if (!item.contains(e.target)) {
      item.classList.remove('open');
      const tr = item.querySelector('.nav-drop-trigger');
      if (tr) tr.setAttribute('aria-expanded','false');
    }
  });
});
// Close all dropdowns on Escape
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item.open').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('open')); });

/* ─── Mobile Menu ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
const burger  = document.getElementById('burger');
const mobMenu = document.getElementById('mob-menu');
const mobOvl  = document.getElementById('mob-overlay');
const mobCls  = document.getElementById('mob-close');
const openMenu = (open) => {
  mobMenu.classList.toggle('open', open);
  mobOvl.classList.toggle('open', open);
  burger.classList.toggle('open', open);
  document.body.style.overflow = open ? 'hidden' : '';
};
burger?.addEventListener('click', () => openMenu(!mobMenu.classList.contains('open')));
mobCls?.addEventListener('click', () => openMenu(false));
mobOvl?.addEventListener('click', () => openMenu(false));

/* Mobile accordion toggles */
document.querySelectorAll('.mob-acc-trigger').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const panelId = btn.id.replace('-trig', '-panel');
    const panel = document.getElementById(panelId);
    if (!panel) return;
    const isOpen = panel.classList.contains('open');
    // Close all others
    document.querySelectorAll('.mob-acc-panel.open').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('open'));
    document.querySelectorAll('.mob-acc-trigger.open').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('open'));
    if (!isOpen) { panel.classList.add('open'); btn.classList.add('open'); }
  });
});

/* ─── Animated Counters ────────────────────────────────────── */
function countUp(el) {
  const target = +el.dataset.target;
  const dur = 1800;
  const step = target / (dur / 16);
  let cur = 0;
  const t = setInterval(() => {
    cur = Math.min(cur + step, target);
    el.textContent = Math.floor(cur);
    if (cur >= target) clearInterval(t);
  }, 16);
}
const countObs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { countUp(e.target); countObs.unobserve(e.target); } });
}, { threshold: 0.5 });
document.querySelectorAll('.count-up[data-target]').forEach(el => countObs.observe(el));

/* ─── Close all dropdowns on page restore (bfcache) ───────── */
function closeAllDropdowns() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item.open').forEach(i => {
    i.classList.remove('open');
    const tr = i.querySelector('.nav-drop-trigger');
    if (tr) tr.setAttribute('aria-expanded','false');
  });
}
window.addEventListener('pageshow', e => { if (e.persisted) closeAllDropdowns(); });
document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => { if (document.visibilityState === 'hidden') closeAllDropdowns(); });

/* ─── Back to Top ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
const btt = document.getElementById('btt');
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => btt.classList.toggle('show', window.scrollY > 500), {passive:true});
btt.addEventListener('click', () => window.scrollTo({top:0, behavior:'smooth'}));

/* ─── Smooth anchor links ──────────────────────────────────── */
document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(a => {
  a.addEventListener('click', e => {
    const t = document.querySelector(a.getAttribute('href'));
    if (t) { e.preventDefault(); t.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'}); }
  });
});

/* ═══ HOME POPUP LOGIC ══════════════════════════════════════════ */
var HP_KEY = 'dl_hp_popup_seen';

function dlCloseHomePopup() {
  var bd = document.getElementById('home-popup-backdrop');
  if (!bd) return;
  bd.classList.remove('visible');
  setTimeout(function() { bd.style.display = 'none'; }, 380);
  try { sessionStorage.setItem(HP_KEY, '1'); } catch(e) {}
}

(function() {
  // Only show once per session
  try { if (sessionStorage.getItem(HP_KEY)) return; } catch(e) {}

  setTimeout(function() {
    var bd = document.getElementById('home-popup-backdrop');
    if (!bd) return;
    bd.style.display = 'flex';
    // Tiny delay so display:flex is painted before opacity transition fires
    requestAnimationFrame(function() {
      requestAnimationFrame(function() { bd.classList.add('visible'); });
    });
  }, 2500);

  // Close when clicking backdrop (outside popup)
  var bd = document.getElementById('home-popup-backdrop');
  if (bd) {
    bd.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      if (e.target === bd) dlCloseHomePopup();
    });
  }
  // Close on Escape key
  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') dlCloseHomePopup();
  });
})();
</script>
<script src="https://marketing254.github.io/dominatelaw-website/js/sheets.js"></script>
